title: Research simple GC baseline before parallel collector path
body:
## What was done

Recorded the decision to treat **gc-arena** as the v0.0 GC baseline and defer **parallel** collection and production runtime policies to later repos and phases.

## Why it mattered

Prevented prototype scope creep: Pecan needed runnable JIT demos, not a shipping parallel GC.

## Research conclusion

**Simple GC in v0.0; parallel GC later** (abfall and phase-B runtime). Same commit marks Phase 5 execution-plan completion.

source.subject: Mark Phase 5 complete with runtime allocator, GC scaffolding, interop builtins, and diagnostic improvements
